copy_an_s3_object_to_an_archive_location: Copy an S3 object to an archive location and delete the original.
destination_bucket_name_can_be_same_as_s: Destination bucket name (can be same as source)
download_an_object_from_s3_and_pass_its: Download an object from S3 and pass its contents to downstream steps.
downloaded_file_stored_in_execution_file: Downloaded file stored in execution files
e_g_text_plain_application_json_auto_det: e.g., text/plain, application/json (auto-detected if not provided)
enter_your_aws_access_key_id: Enter your AWS Access Key ID
enter_your_aws_secret_access_key: Enter your AWS Secret Access Key
filter_by_prefix_e_g_folder_or_leave: Filter by prefix (e.g., folder/ or leave empty for all)
integrate_s3_into_the_workflow_upload_fi: Integrate S3 into the workflow. Upload files, download objects, list bucket contents, delete objects, and copy objects between buckets. Requires AWS access key and secret access key.
list_objects_in_an_s3_bucket_under_a: List objects in an S3 bucket under a prefix for inventory or cleanup.
maximum_number_of_objects_to_return_defa: Maximum number of objects to return (default: 1000)
optional_aws_region_override_for_downloa: Optional AWS region override for downloads
or_enter_text_content_to_upload: Or enter text content to upload
reference_a_file_from_previous_blocks: Reference a file from previous blocks
s3_document_ingestion_to_knowledge_base: S3 document ingestion to knowledge base
s3_uri_s3_bucket_key_for_use_with: S3 URI (s3://bucket/key) for use with other AWS services
select_acl_for_copied_object_default_pri: Select ACL for copied object (default: private)
upload_a_generated_file_to_an_s3_bucket: Upload a generated file to an S3 bucket and return its object URL.
upload_download_list_and_manage_s3_files: Upload, download, list, and manage S3 files
used_when_s3_url_does_not_include_region: Used when S3 URL does not include region
